name: obsidian-tutor
description: Adaptive tutor that turns an Obsidian study vault into a personalized learning loop.

scripts.start: npm -w functions run build && concurrently -k -n emulators,web,functions -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run emulators" "npm -w web run dev" "npm -w functions run build:watch"
scripts.build: npm -w functions run build && npm -w web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w shared run typecheck && npm -w functions run typecheck && npm -w web run typecheck
